lines.text: Good evening. Did you find everything you needed?
lines.fullTranslation: İyi akşamlar. İhtiyacınız olan her şeyi buldunuz mu?

lines.text: Yes, everything was easy to find.
Would you like a receipt?
Yes, please.
Excuse me, where can I find the milk?
It is in aisle five near the yogurt section.
lines.fullTranslation: O yoğurt bölümünün yanında beşinci koridorda.

lines.text: Thank you for your help.
You are welcome.
That will be thirty-two euros and fifty cents.
lines.fullTranslation: Bu otuz iki euro elli sent oluyor.

lines.text: Can I pay by card?
Of course. Please use the payment terminal.
lines.fullTranslation: Tabii ki. Lütfen ödeme terminalini kullanın.

lines.text: Done. Thank you.
Is this product on sale?
Yes, it currently has a twenty percent discount.
lines.fullTranslation: Evet, şu anda yüzde yirmi indirimi var.

lines.text: How long will the sale last?
Until the end of the week.
Are these croissants fresh?
Yes, they were baked this morning.
I will take four of them.
Certainly. I will pack them for you.
lines.fullTranslation: Tabii ki. Onları sizin için paketleyeceğim.

lines.text: This machine is not scanning the item.
Let me help you with that.
lines.fullTranslation: Size bununla yardım etmeme izin verin.

lines.text: Thank you. I was not sure what to do.
lines.fullTranslation: Teşekkür ederim. Ne yapacağımı emin değildim.

lines.text: It happens quite often.
Do you sell organic vegetables?
Yes, they are in the produce section.
Are they more expensive than regular vegetables?
lines.fullTranslation: Onlar normal sebzelerden daha pahalı mı?

lines.text: Usually a little more expensive.
Do you have a loyalty card?
No, but I would like to apply for one.
lines.fullTranslation: Hayır, ama bir tane için başvurmak istiyorum.

lines.text: You can register online or at customer service.
lines.fullTranslation: Online veya müşteri hizmetlerinde kayıt olabilirsiniz.

lines.text: Great, I will do that later.
I would like to return this product.
Do you still have the receipt?
Yes, I bought it yesterday.
We can refund the money to your card.
Where is the frozen food section?
At the back of the store near the drinks.
Do you have frozen pizza?
Yes, there are several brands available.
These apples look very fresh.
They arrived this morning from a local farm.
lines.fullTranslation: Onlar bu sabah yerel bir çiftlikten geldi.

lines.text: I would like one kilogram, please.
Certainly. I will weigh them for you.
lines.fullTranslation: Tabii ki. Onları sizin için tartacağım.

lines.text: The supermarket will close in ten minutes.
I only need a few more items.
lines.fullTranslation: Sadece birkaç ürüne daha ihtiyacım var.

lines.text: Please proceed to the checkout when you are ready.
I will. Thank you for letting me know.
lines.fullTranslation: Yapacağım. Bana bildirdiğiniz için teşekkür ederim.
